hyperedges.label: User creation flow: Controller -> Service -> Mapper -> Repository -> Model
Integration tests sharing Testcontainers PostgreSQL base
Eligibility evaluation: Service evaluates Issue/Flight/EuContext -> returns EligibilityResult
Claim Lifecycle Request DTOs
ClaimResponse Composed DTOs
Exception Handling Infrastructure
Claim Aggregate Root — Claim owns Flight, Issue, BoardingDocuments, and ClaimEvents via JPA cascade
Claim lifecycle action DTOs all carry a single optional note field (close, follow-up, reject)
MapStruct mapper layer converts between domain models and DTOs/responses
Claim Lifecycle Orchestration: ClaimLifecycleServiceImpl coordinates ClaimWorkflowService, ClaimDocumentsService, EligibilityService, ClaimLetterService
Document Storage Validation: magic-bytes MIME check, size limit, allowed types before persisting BoardingDocuments
Pre-Submit Auto Transition: EligibilityService required docs + ClaimDocumentsService uploaded types -> ClaimWorkflowService.autoPreSubmitStatus
